query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.images, p.blurPlaceholder FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 60018 AND p.isActive = true ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder LIMIT 20;
